case_title: PHYLLIS ENGLISH VS. KNOX PARTNERS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO KNOX PARTNERS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-22-2010 AT 3:30PM.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ENGLISH, PHYLLIS AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX PARTNERS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ENGLISH, PHYLLIS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-20-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENGLISH, PHYLLIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY $180.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS A RENT ADJUSTMENT FOR THE 18 DAYS THAT PLAINTIFF'S SHOWER FACILITIES WERE NOT AVAILABLE. DEFENDANT KNOX PARTNERS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLISH, PHYLLIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
